text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. We're glad to have you on the team — please review the mod guidelines and don't hesitate to reach out if you have questions.
Hey guide_sam, welcome aboard! You're now an event_helper. Looking forward to seeing you at community events — check the events calendar for upcoming opportunities!
Welcome newbie_kim! You're now a member of the community. Take a look around, introduce yourself, and feel free to ask if you need anything.
Welcome mentor_lina! You've been approved as a mentor. Your experience will be a huge asset to the community — check out the mentorship channel to connect with members who could use your guidance.
